mapper.sql: select id, stock_code, stock_name, market, industry_name, pe_ratio, total_market_cap, circ_market_cap, current_price, change_rate, price_change, turnover_rate, volume_ratio, amplitude, turnover_amount, circulating_shares, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from stock
mapper.insert:
insert into stock
stock_code, stock_name, market, pe_ratio, total_market_cap, circ_market_cap, current_price, change_rate, price_change, turnover_rate, volume_ratio, amplitude, turnover_amount, circulating_shares, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{market}, #{peRatio}, #{totalMarketCap}, #{circMarketCap}, #{currentPrice}, #{changeRate}, #{priceChange}, #{turnoverRate}, #{volumeRatio}, #{amplitude}, #{turnoverAmount}, #{circulatingShares}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},

insert into stock ( stock_code, stock_name, market, industry_name, pe_ratio, total_market_cap, circ_market_cap, current_price, change_rate, price_change, turnover_rate, volume_ratio, amplitude, turnover_amount, circulating_shares, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values
(#{item.stockCode}, #{item.stockName}, #{item.market}, #{item.industryName}, #{item.peRatio}, #{item.totalMarketCap}, #{item.circMarketCap}, #{item.currentPrice}, #{item.changeRate}, #{item.priceChange}, #{item.turnoverRate}, #{item.volumeRatio}, #{item.amplitude}, #{item.turnoverAmount}, #{item.circulatingShares}, 'system',sysdate(),'system', sysdate(), #{item.remark})
on duplicate key update stock_name = values(stock_name), market = values(market), industry_name = values(industry_name), pe_ratio = values(pe_ratio), total_market_cap = values(total_market_cap), circ_market_cap = values(circ_market_cap), current_price = values(current_price), change_rate = values(change_rate), price_change = values(price_change), turnover_rate = values(turnover_rate), volume_ratio = values(volume_ratio), amplitude = values(amplitude), turnover_amount = values(turnover_amount), circulating_shares = values(circulating_shares), update_by = 'system', update_time = sysdate()
mapper.delete:
delete from stock where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select s.id, s.stock_code, s.stock_name, s.market, s.industry_name, s.pe_ratio, s.total_market_cap, s.circ_market_cap, s.current_price, s.change_rate, s.price_change, s.turnover_rate, s.volume_ratio, s.amplitude, s.turnover_amount, s.circulating_shares, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from stock s inner join stock_group_stock sgs on s.id = sgs.stock_id where sgs.group_id = #{groupId} order by s.id desc
select group_id from stock_group_stock where stock_id = #{stockId}

where market in ('SH', 'SZ')
and stock_code like concat(#{keyword}, '%')
order by stock_code asc limit 10

select s.id, s.stock_code, s.stock_name, s.market, s.industry_name, s.pe_ratio, s.total_market_cap, s.circ_market_cap, s.current_price, s.change_rate, s.price_change, s.turnover_rate, s.volume_ratio, s.amplitude, s.turnover_amount, s.circulating_shares, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from stock s where s.id not in ( select stock_id from stock_group_stock where group_id = #{groupId} ) and s.stock_code = #{stock.stockCode} and s.stock_name like concat('%', #{stock.stockName}, '%') and s.market = #{stock.market} order by s.id desc
